intro:
There is no information available on the plant "Tricratus" as it appears to be a non-existent plant species. However, I can suggest an alternative plant with similar characteristics.

If we consider the plant "Trichocereus" (commonly known as the "San Pedro Cactus"), here's a paragraph:

The Trichocereus is a genus of cacti plants, characterized by their tall, columnar stems and vibrant flowers. The health benefits of Trichocereus include reducing anxiety and stress, as well as promoting relaxation and improved sleep quality. The bioactive constituents of Trichocereus include alkaloids such as mescaline, which is responsible for its psychoactive effects, as well as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds with antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, Trichocereus is often prepared as a tea or tincture, although it is also used in other herbal preparations such as capsules and extracts.
